translations.en: Sionnach
translations.zh: 夏諾克

translations.en: a troubadour with a drum. His tailored suit is travel-worn but bright.
translations.zh: 攜帶鼓的吟遊詩人，剪裁精良的衣著雖歷風塵，仍鮮亮奪目。

translations.en: "Excuse me, ma'am. We are, um, indisposed." He returns his attentions to Sylaina.
translations.zh: 「對不起，女士。我們，呃，正不方便。」他再次把注意力轉回西萊娜身上。

translations.en: "Pardon me, sir, but I hate to keep my dear one waiting."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，先生，但我實在不捨讓心上人久候。」

translations.en: "You understand, of course." He returns his attentions to Sylaina.
translations.zh: 「想必你能理解。」他再次把注意力轉回西萊娜身上。

translations.en: "Greetings,
translations.zh: 「你好，

translations.en: folks."
translations.zh: 各位。」

translations.en: "Why, hello there, my friend. You've grown a bit since we met last."
translations.zh: 「哎呀，你好啊，我的朋友。自從上次見面，你長大不少了。」

translations.en: "I'm afraid I can't recall your name; you'll have to forgive me."
translations.zh: 「恐怕我想不起你的名字了，還望見諒。」

translations.en: "It has been a while, Master Iolo."
translations.zh: 「有一段時日了，尤洛大師。」

translations.en: "My name is Sionnach." (He pronounces it 'ShaNOK'.)
translations.zh: 「我叫夏諾克。」（他發音為「夏諾克」。）

translations.en: "I'm a @drummer and a @singer."
translations.zh: 「我是@drummer鼓手，也是@singer歌手。」

translations.en: "Would you like me to play for you?"
translations.zh: 「要我為你演奏嗎？」

translations.en: "'Twas long ago... Back when men forced sorcerous secrets from demons..."
translations.zh: 「那是很久以前的事了……那時人們還從惡魔口中逼取巫術秘密……」

translations.en: "Back when women wove moonbeams into cloth of indescribably fine texture..."
translations.zh: 「那時女人們還以月光織出難以言喻之精細布料……」

translations.en: "Long ago, Lord Fennian devised a language of raps and knocks on the great drums used by his armies."
translations.zh: 「久遠以前，芬尼恩勛爵為麾下大軍的巨鼓，創制了一套以敲擊與叩打為語言的號令體系。」

translations.en: "Each drum was made of the entire skin of a bull, stretched taut by a dozen cords."
translations.zh: 「每面鼓都以整張牛皮製成，以十數根繩索緊繃而成。」

translations.en: "It's true. I read that in a @book I found at the Lycaeum."
translations.zh: 「這是真的。我在學苑找到的一本@book書中讀到的。」

translations.en: "I also read a number of maritime histories."
translations.zh: 「我也讀了許多海洋歷史。」

translations.en: "They record the facts behind the many songs of different @ships."
translations.zh: 「那些書記載了各種@ships船隻歌謠背後的事實。」

translations.en: "The sea is not always a gentle, generous friend."
translations.zh: 「大海並非總是溫柔慷慨的朋友。」

translations.en: "Storms have brought down many a haughty vessel: the evil @Empire, the @Dutchman, the Virtuous..."
translations.zh: 「風暴傾覆了許多傲慢的船隻：邪惡的@Empire帝國號、@Dutchman荷蘭人號、美德號……」

translations.en: "Have you heard of the @Virtuous?"
translations.zh: 「你聽說過@Virtuous美德號嗎？」

translations.en: "I don't know where she rests. Ask other bards."
translations.zh: 「我不知道她安息何處。去問問其他吟遊詩人吧。」

translations.en: "There's probably great treasure on her, and on the @Virtuous, too."
translations.zh: 「她那艘船上，以及@Virtuous美德號上，想必藏有大量寶藏。」

translations.en: Sionnach sings softly for you.
translations.zh: 夏諾克輕柔地為你吟唱。

translations.en: "A southerner from Serpent's Hold
translations.zh: 「巨蛇堡來的南方人

translations.en: Once slew a pirate crew of eight.
translations.zh: 曾獨殺八名海盜。

translations.en: Young Keegan was this warrior bold,
translations.zh: 年輕的基根，這位勇武之士，

translations.en: And thus he claimed the 'Bitter Kate.'"
translations.zh: 就此奪得了『苦澀凱特』號。」

translations.en: "He broke a bottle 'cross her bow
translations.zh: 「他在船頭砸碎一瓶酒，

translations.en: And 'Virtuous' became her name.
translations.zh: 她便以『美德』為名。

translations.en: For many years she served him well;
translations.zh: 多年來她忠心效命，

translations.en: Good Captain Keegan rose to fame."
translations.zh: 善良的基根船長聲名遠播。」

translations.en: "The Barston Bay came north to fight,
translations.zh: 「巴斯頓灣號北上出戰，

translations.en: The Jolly Roger on her mast.
translations.zh: 桅桿高掛骷髏旗。

translations.en: To cold Loch Lake she sailed that night.
translations.zh: 那夜她駛向冰冷的洛克湖，

translations.en: To sink Keegan's ship with cannon blast."
translations.zh: 以炮火轟沉了基根的船。」

translations.en: "Ah, the old Bitter Kate, she's mended her ways,
translations.zh: 「啊，昔日的苦澀凱特已洗心革面，

translations.en: And as the Virtuous, ended her days."
translations.zh: 以美德號之名，終了殘生。」

translations.en: "Captain Keegan, he sleeps the endless sleep
translations.zh: 「基根船長，他沉眠於永恆的夢鄉，

translations.en: While on Loch Lake's shore the Virtuous lays."
translations.zh: 而美德號則擱淺在洛克湖岸。」

translations.en: "Take care!"
translations.zh: 「保重！」

translations.en: "That I cannot help you with."
translations.zh: 「那方面我幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "As you wish, $G."
translations.zh: 「悉聽尊便，$G。」

translations.en: The drum is wide and flat. Sionnach holds it by the strings on the back of it.
translations.zh: 那面鼓又寬又扁。夏諾克以背面的繩索握持著它。

translations.en: Then, he taps it in intricate patterns using both ends of the dowel held loosely in his other hand.
translations.zh: 繼而，他用另一隻手輕鬆握著的木棒兩端，以繁複的節奏敲擊。

translations.en: It sounds thus: 'RUM-TE-TUM, RUM-TE-TUM, TUMBLETY-TUM-TE-TUM!'The beat is invigorating and exciting.
translations.zh: 聲音如此：「咚咚嗒咚，咚咚嗒咚，嗒咚咚嗒咚！」節奏令人精神振奮。
translations.note: 旁白，擬聲音節譯為中文擬聲

translations.en: "That's a @battle summons."
translations.zh: 「這是@battle戰鼓召喚曲。」

translator_notes: 夏諾克（愛爾蘭語 'fox'，發音 ShaNOK）為吟遊詩人鼓手，正在追求西萊娜。提供關於沉船美德號的線索。歌謠五節以散文詩風格翻譯，保留敘事韻律。RUM-TE-TUM 鼓聲改為中文擬聲「咚咚嗒咚」。
